ListModels on every poll. The mutation forces a live refresh, sharing the same
in-flight guard so concurrent refreshes coalesce into a single fetch. BaseURLs
are sanitized (credentials/query/fragment stripped) before crossing the ts-net
trust boundary; auth gating is provided by the existing requireTrusted wrapper
on the /graphql route. [ddx-791a4f65]
